text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I lost. I really thought I had it in the bag...
choice_data_list: The other racers were pretty good.
The other racers were pretty good.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Mayday, mayday! No talking about others!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: You're only supposed to look at me, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
But wait! You're saying that, but you still totally
love me, right? ☆ Right?!
choice_data_list: I think that depends on you...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Hey! Hey! I'm gonna get first next time!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: So... give me all your support!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I'll definitely make you realize that I'm so much
better than the other racers! I promise!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I promise I'll win next time! It'll be the coolest
race ever!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I'll prove to you that I'm the prettiest and finest
lady around!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I'll win you over again! You'll see!
